basic_info.title: Cannon Fodder
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of tactical action that perfectly blends humor with challenging gameplay. The isometric view and squad mechanics set a new standard for the genre.

play_today.details: The definitive experience. Original Amiga version considered best by fans for graphics, sound, and authentic gameplay speed. Use OpenFodder open-source engine to run on modern systems with enhanced features including higher resolutions, save states, and campaign editor.

recommended_patches.name: OpenFodder Engine
recommended_patches.description: Modern open-source port of Cannon Fodder engine supporting Windows, Linux, macOS. Features higher resolutions, save states, campaign/map editor, random map generation, and runs with original GOG data files.

recommended_patches.name: Password SRAM Patch
recommended_patches.description: Adds simple saving mechanism to Game Boy Color version which originally lacked save functionality.

optimal_settings: Use OpenFodder for modern enhancements
Higher resolution scaling available in OpenFodder
Save states enabled
Available via Flathub or compile from source
Supports all modern Linux distributions
Native OpenFodder build available
Best performance on modern Macs

play_today.details: Official GOG version with DOSBox wrapper. Runs at approximately twice the speed of Amiga/Mega Drive versions making it harder, especially in later levels. Good for quick access without emulation setup.

recommended_patches.name: OpenFodder Engine
recommended_patches.description: Use OpenFodder with GOG data files for better experience than native DOSBox version.

play_today.details: SNES version has best graphics but poor joypad controls. Requires Nintendo Mouse peripheral for optimal experience. Good alternative if you prefer console aesthetic.

optimal_settings: Configure mouse support for best controls
4x internal resolution scaling

play_today.details: Portable version with simplified graphics and gameplay. Lacks save functionality without patch. Good for casual play on the go.

recommended_patches.name: Password SRAM Patch
recommended_patches.description: Adds saving mechanism to GBC version.

optimal_settings: 2x or 3x internal resolution scaling
Apply Password SRAM patch for saving

play_today.details: The original and most authentic experience. Praised by the community for its superior soundtrack, smooth animation, and tight controls. While it requires emulation, it represents the 'definitive' artistic vision of Sensible Software. The CD32 version offers CD-quality audio, but the floppy version is the standard. Essential for purists seeking the original 1993 feel.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder Password SRAM Patch
recommended_patches.description: Adds a save state mechanism to the original Amiga version, allowing players to save progress at any point without needing to memorize passwords.

recommended_patches.name: WHDLoad Cannon Fodder
recommended_patches.description: A pre-configured loader that enables the game to run directly from a hard drive with optimized loading times and mouse support.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder Save Game Patch
recommended_patches.description: Adds a simple saving mechanism to the original Amiga version, allowing players to save their progress mid-mission which is not possible in the unpatched release.

optimal_settings: Enable CD32 audio for superior sound quality
Set resolution to 640x400 for authentic aspect ratio
Enable mouse pointer for precise control
Use 'Auto' cycles for smooth performance
Enable mouse input for on-screen control
Set aspect ratio to 4:3 to match original display
Enable CD32 audio emulation if available
Use 'Auto' cycles for optimal frame rate

play_today.details: A solid alternative to the Windows version for those preferring the original PC experience. Features slightly different graphics in the 'Boot Hill' sequence compared to the Amiga. Requires DOSBox for modern play, which adds a layer of complexity. Good for retro enthusiasts who want the specific PC port quirks and sound effects, though the Windows version is generally more convenient.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder Password SRAM Patch
recommended_patches.description: Adds a save state mechanism to the original DOS version, allowing players to save progress at any point without needing to memorize passwords.

recommended_patches.name: DOSBox High Resolution Patch
recommended_patches.description: Allows the game to run at higher resolutions within DOSBox for better clarity on modern screens while maintaining original gameplay.

recommended_patches.name: Open Fodder
recommended_patches.description: A modern open-source engine recreation that runs the original game assets natively on Windows, fixing resolution scaling, mouse input lag, and adding widescreen support.

recommended_patches.name: Improved DOSBox Configuration
recommended_patches.description: A community-tuned DOSBox configuration file that applies shaders (2xsai) and optimizes video output (overlay/ddraw) to fix glitchy music and sound effects.

optimal_settings: Set cycles to 'auto' for smooth performance
Enable mouse input for precise control
Set fullscreen mode for immersive experience
Configure aspect ratio to 4:3 for authentic look
Set cycles to 'auto' for smooth performance
Enable mouse input for precise control
Configure aspect ratio to 4:3 for authentic look
Use 'fullscreen' mode for immersive experience

play_today.details: A competent console port that adapts the game for controller-only play. While it removes the mouse precision, it offers a unique challenge and is the best console version available. The graphics are scaled down to fit the SNES palette, and the music is rearranged for the SPC700 chip, losing some of the original's depth.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder SNES Save State Patch
recommended_patches.description: A community patch that enables save states or mid-mission saving on the SNES version, addressing the lack of save functionality in the original port.

optimal_settings: Internal Resolution: Set to 2x or 4x for crisp retro graphics
Audio: Enable 'S-SPC' sound emulation for accurate music playback
Input: Configure controller to 'Gamepad' and enable 'Turbo' for rapid movement
Video: Use 'Bilinear' filtering for smoother sprite scaling
Screen: Set 'Stretch' to 'Full' for immersive gameplay
Audio: Enable 'S-SPC' for high-quality sound emulation
Input: Map on-screen controls to match original SNES layout
Save States: Enable 'Auto-Save' every 5 minutes for convenience

play_today.details: The definitive modern experience via GOG or Steam. Runs natively on modern OS without complex emulation. Features the enhanced PC graphics with detailed 'Boot Hill' scenes and superior audio mixing. Supports mouse and keyboard controls essential for precision, plus modern controller support via patches. Includes the full original campaign with no region locks.

recommended_patches.name: Open Fodder
recommended_patches.description: An open-source engine rewrite that enables native widescreen support, high-resolution textures, and modern OS compatibility while preserving the original gameplay mechanics.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder Password SRAM Patch
recommended_patches.description: Adds a save state mechanism to the original game, allowing players to save progress at any point without needing to memorize passwords.

description.synopsis: In a world of absurd military conflicts, players command a squad of soldiers through a series of increasingly difficult missions. The game satirizes the military-industrial complex while challenging players to use tactical precision to survive. Soldiers must navigate hostile terrain, manage squad dynamics, and complete objectives against overwhelming odds.
key_features: Isometric perspective allowing 360-degree movement and shooting
Squad-based tactical control with up to six soldiers per level
Dynamic squad splitting into three distinct groups (Snake, Eagle, Puma)
Real-time strategy elements mixed with action shooter mechanics
Humorous narrative delivered through cutscenes and soldier dialogue
Varied weapon loadouts including rifles, grenades, and RPGs
Cooperative multiplayer mode for two players
High difficulty requiring precise positioning and timing
Satirical commentary on the futility of war
legacy_and_impact: Cannon Fodder is widely regarded as one of the greatest strategy-action hybrids ever created. It defined the isometric shooter genre and influenced countless tactical games that followed. Its satirical take on war and military life remains culturally relevant.
